subcodes.first_line: O wanderer of mountain and desert in the path of the Merciful! Every gathering shall be scattered, and every order and arrangement shall come undone [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگردان کوه و بیابان در سبیل رحمن هر جمعی پریشان گردد و هر سر و سامانی
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
